title: 28 Grids Bead Storage Box Diamond Embroidery Box diamond painting storage bead storage diamond art storage box Clear Bead Container for Beads Art DIY Crafts Jewelry
features: Premium Material: Made of transparent PP Plastics, environmental and durable, lightweight and practical, odourless and nontoxic, It is quite easy to see the inside content clearly and find out what you need.
Detachable Dividers: The box contains 7 rows of 4 conjuncted grids, the lids each row is detachable,so you can have bigger compartments to store larger items for storing various small items.

Multi-Functional Design: This box with 28 individual grids could meet your needs for collecting and storing these essential parts, is perfect for storing beads, jewelry, earrings, crafts, ornaments, miniatures, buttons, small toys, safety pins and can also be used as a stone collection for anything you like.

Double Seal Box: Small grids are packed in big box, it can provide your stuffs with double seal and protect them from dust or rust, the snap buckle makes the box tighter and stronger, can provide your stuffs with double seal and protect them from dust or rust.

Easy to keep organized: The plastic grid storage box will help you to store and classify small items. Transparent container, so you can see inside content clearly, each compartment snaps shut nicely and seals tightly, so the contents will not spill out.
